tasks.label: Build Pico Project
tasks.detail: Build the Pico project using CMake

tasks.label: Clean Build
tasks.command: rm -rf build && cmake -B build -S . && cmake --build build
tasks.detail: Clean and rebuild the entire project

tasks.label: Flash via Debug Probe
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -f target/rp2040.cfg -c 'adapter speed 5000' -c 'program build/pico_test.elf verify reset exit'
tasks.detail: Flash the firmware using the debug probe
